colors_solid_button_labels.label: Button label

indent_section.label: Indent section

new_tab.label: Open links in a new tab

favicon.label: Favicon image
favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

custom_colors.label: Custom colors
custom_colors.info: Like "Red: #ff0000". Each color must be in its own line.

pagination_type.label: Pagination type
pagination_type.info: Pagination type for pages of collections and blogs.

show_cart_note.label: Enable cart note for Cart Drawer

include_margins.label: Make section margins the same as theme

card_active.label: Enable full card
card_active.info: This option should only be enabled for one element.

text.label: Text
text.default: This section allows you to highlight key improvements, emphasizing the effectiveness of what you offer with a clear side-by-side comparison

image_before.label: Image before
image_before.info: Both pictures must be added in order for the comparison to appear.

subheading.label: Subheading
subheading.default: A brief tagline for this slide

text.label: Description
text.default: Use this space to provide details about what’s being featured in this slide, whether it’s a new launch, a trending product, or an exclusive deal

title.label: Heading
title.default: Snapshots That Capture Our Style and Quality

text.label: Text
text.default: Explore a curated collage reflecting our brand’s design and craftsmanship.

adapt_height_background_image.label: Adapt section height to background image size

show_view_all.label: Enable "View all" button if list includes more collections than shown

button_style.label: Button style
button_style.info: The inverse option is for the overlay image type

round_stamp_size.info: This option sets the font size in px. If you want more words to fit in the stamp, then reduce it

show_view_all.label: Enable "Read all" button if blog includes more blog posts than shown

show_image.label: Show featured image
show_image.info: For best results, use an image with a 2:3 aspect ratio.

title_number.label: Heading big text
title_number.info: Use this text if you want to highlight some short text in a larger font, such as a number

text_information.label: Additional information
text_information.default: Use this space to describe the theme, purpose, or uniqueness of the collection, helping customers understand its value.

content.default: Include additional information. Use this space to provide a brief overview of the product, including what makes it special and why customers should consider it

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: A heading is required to display the menu.

subtext.label: Subtext
subtext.default: Here’s some descriptive text for your footer. For improved alignment and readability, it’s recommended to break the text into multiple lines.

header__2.info: To display your social media accounts, link them in your theme settings.

header__4.info: To add a country/region, go to your [payment settings.](/admin/settings/payments)

header__6.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

header__9.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

header__8.info: To add store policies, go to your [policy settings](/admin/settings/legal).

show_collection_card.label: Show collections in search modal
show_collection_card.info: If this option is disabled, settings below will not work

mega_menu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_menu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the link with the submenu. Only the menu items of the first nesting will be displayed. For more information, visit [the documentation page.](https://superfinedigital.com/help-center/documentation/portland/#mega-menu)

round_stamp_width.info: This option sets the stamp diameter in px

text.default: This section allows you to complement the visual content with descriptive text that informs, engages, and encourages the visitor to take action

button_label.info: Leave the label blank to hide the button.

trigger-close-delay.label: Time delay for a trigger close

manual-selector.label: CSS selector for manual trigger
manual-selector.info: If the html element has buttons or links inside, then clicking on them will not work.

overlay-close.label: Click overlay to close
overlay-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user clicks on overlay

esc-close.label: Press ESC to close
esc-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses ESC key

f4-close.label: Press F4 to close
f4-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses F4 key

heading.info: Include a heading that explains the content.

paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

text.default: Here can be a description of the countdown—use this space to inform customers about the event, or promotion.

text.label: Description
text.default: Here can be a brief overview of the information available in this section, explaining its purpose and how users can interact with it

heading.label: Heading
heading.default: Use this space to ask a detailed question about shipping, returns, or product usage.

text.label: Description
text.default: Here can be a brief but clear response to the question, giving customers a quick answer without unnecessary details

answer.default: In this section, you can provide a detailed explanation, including step-by-step instructions, specific product details, use cases, troubleshooting tips, common issues, recommended solutions, best practices, or policy clarifications, ensuring that customers receive a complete, helpful, and accurate answer to their question without confusion or unnecessary delays in resolution.
